title: xenophyllum rigidum
intro: Xenophyllum rigidum, also known as the "Cactus of the Mountains," is a type of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. It is a succulent plant that is native to Mexico and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's leaves and stems contain flavonoids, alkaloids, and other compounds that provide various health benefits, including antioxidant, antimicrobial, and anti-inflammatory effects. Xenophyllum rigidum is traditionally prepared as a tea or infusion, and can also be used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and salves, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
